query:
-- runner.ts filter: payment_external_id ไม่ขึ้นต้น "pay-" และ total_paid_amount > 0
-- debtDb.ts filter: external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$'
-- ดูว่า 2 filter นี้ให้ผลต่างกันไหม

SELECT 
  -- runner.ts style: ไม่ขึ้นต้น pay- และ amount > 0
  SUM(CASE WHEN external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%' AND CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as runner_count,
  -- debtDb.ts style: numeric external_id หรือ TXRT receipt
  SUM(CASE WHEN (external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as debtdb_count,
  -- ต่างกัน
  SUM(CASE WHEN (external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%' AND CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0) 
              AND NOT (external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_runner_not_debtdb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%' AND CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0) 
              AND (external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_debtdb_not_runner
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';

-- runner.ts filter: payment_external_id ไม่ขึ้นต้น "pay-" และ total_paid_amount > 0
-- debtDb.ts filter: external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$'
-- ดูว่า 2 filter นี้ให้ผลต่างกันไหม

SELECT 
  -- runner.ts style: ไม่ขึ้นต้น pay- และ amount > 0
  SUM(CASE WHEN external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%' AND CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0 THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as runner_count,
  -- debtDb.ts style: numeric external_id หรือ TXRT receipt
  SUM(CASE WHEN (external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as debtdb_count,
  -- ต่างกัน
  SUM(CASE WHEN (external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%' AND CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0) 
              AND NOT (external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_runner_not_debtdb,
  SUM(CASE WHEN NOT (external_id NOT LIKE 'pay-%' AND CAST(amount AS DECIMAL(18,2)) > 0) 
              AND (external_id REGEXP '^[0-9]+$' OR receipt_no REGEXP '^TXRT.*-[0-9]+$') THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as in_debtdb_not_runner
FROM payment_transactions
WHERE section = 'Fastfone365';
